'''Red Wing squad''' was a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] unit consisting of ten veteran mercenaries. They were sent to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taul/Legends|Taul]] to retrieve an unknown object after the [[Battle of Taul]]. They participated in a [[skirmish on Taul]]. The squad was armed with [[Hunting blaster/Legends|hunting blasters]]. A [[Specialist/Legends|specialist]] carried a [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Return to Taul}}
